title: Craftboat Willie
description: Steamboat Willie is public domain? Thanks for the id- I mean, my original idea. Introducing, Craftboat Willie!
body:
# Craftboat Willie
My totally original idea that is definitely not a direct rip-off of Steamboat Willie. 100% made by me. Totally.

## Features
- Fully working Steamboat Willie mob with custom spawning
- Custom head of Steamboat Willie which gives benefits
- Steering wheel of Steamboat Willie which "turns you into a boat"
- Animation of Steamboat Willie doing the ic- I mean original dance while steering a ship

### Legal Stuff
For legal reasons, so Disney doesn't take this down, and so Modrinth doesn't take this down, this is a Minecraft version of the original Mickey Mouse character found in the short film by Disney, Steamboat Willie.
